## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- A checklist. Contributors must satisfy ALL of these for the issue to be marked Resolved. -->

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
- [ ] All new code includes corresponding tests
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] Documentation updated if public API changes

## Complexity

<!-- Choose one — this maps to Drips Wave Points -->
- [ ] Trivial (100 pts) — typos, minor docs, small copy changes
- [ ] Medium (150 pts) — standard feature, bug fix, involved docs
- [ ] High (200 pts) — new module, architecture change, complex integration
